message:
fix: use unique temp files in AtomicWriteFile to prevent concurrent corruption (gt-dcq7v)

AtomicWriteFile used a deterministic .tmp suffix, so concurrent writers
to the same path would clobber each others temp file. Switch to
os.CreateTemp with a random suffix pattern, ensuring each writer gets
its own temp file. Also adds a concurrency integrity test that verifies
no cross-writer data contamination occurs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
